---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Download:** [Full CV (PDF)](assets/cv.pdf)
:::

## Education

**PhD in [Your Field]** · *Expected [Year]*
Your University, Department of [Department]
Dissertation: "[Title]" · Advisor: [Name]

**MA in [Field]** · *[Year]*
Your University

**BA in [Field]** · *[Year]*
Your Undergraduate Institution

---

## Research Interests

[Interest 1] · [Interest 2] · [Interest 3] · [Interest 4]

---

## Working Papers

- **"Paper Title"** (with Co-author). *Under review at Journal.*
- **"Another Paper Title"**. *Draft available upon request.*

---

## Publications

- **"Article Title."** *Journal Name* Vol. X, No. Y (Year): Z–Z.

---

## Conference Presentations

- **[Conference Name]**, [City], [Year]. "[Paper Title]."
- **[Conference Name]**, [City], [Year]. "[Paper Title]."

---

## Teaching

**Teaching Assistant** · Your University

- Course Name (Undergraduate) — [Semester, Year]
- Course Name (Graduate) — [Semester, Year]

---

## Awards & Fellowships

- [Fellowship / Award Name] — [Granting Institution], [Year]
- [Fellowship / Award Name] — [Granting Institution], [Year]

---

## Skills

**Software:** R, Stata, Python, LaTeX, Quarto  
**Languages:** [Language 1] (native), [Language 2] (proficient)

---

## References

Available upon request.
